releaseNotes: Hides the cmd window that briefly flashed open when launching Codex Desktop (CREATE_NO_WINDOW for desktop mode only — CLI still needs its console for the TUI). Silences the Chinese-locale "file not found" mojibake that where/tasklist write to stderr in the system ANSI codepage. Drops the "(via Echobird)" suffix from Codex/OpenCode/Qwen-Code provider display names — providers now show just the bare domain (e.g. deepseek instead of deepseek (via Echobird)).
